mapper.select: SELECT MM.LOGIN_ID, MM.PASS_WD, MM.LOGIN_GB, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(MM.REGIST_NO) AS REGIST_NO, MD.MEMBER_NM, MD.USE_YN, MD.COMPANY_ID, MD.BRANCH_ID, MD.SANGSA_ID, MD.MEMBER_GB FROM TM_MEMBER_MT MM, TM_MEMBER_DT MD WHERE MM.LOGIN_ID = MD.LOGIN_ID AND MM.LOGIN_ID = MD.MEMBER_ID AND MM.LOGIN_ID = #{userId} AND MM.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NM, ASSOCIATION_ID, BIZ_NO, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DT, POST_NO, COMPANY_NO FROM TM_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #{COMPANY_ID} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT BRANCH_ID as CODE_CD, BRANCH_NM as CODE_NM FROM TM_BRANCH WHERE COMPANY_ID = #{COMPANY_ID} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CODE_NM
SELECT ASSOCIATION_ID as CODE_CD, COMPANY_NM as CODE_NM FROM TM_ASSOCIATION
SELECT COUNT(LOGIN_ID) AS RECCNT FROM TM_MEMBER_MT WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID}

SELECT MT.LOGIN_ID, MT.LOGIN_GB, MT.REGIST_NO, MT.USE_YN, DT.MEMBER_NM, DT.TEL_NO, DT.MPHONE_NO, DT.COMPANY_ID, DT.BRANCH_ID, DT.SANGSA_ID, DT.MEMBER_GB FROM TM_MEMBER_MT MT LEFT JOIN TM_MEMBER_DT DT ON MT.LOGIN_ID = DT.LOGIN_ID WHERE MT.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT MT.LOGIN_ID AS LOGIN_ID, MT.LOGIN_GB AS LOGIN_GB, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(MT.REGIST_NO) AS REGIST_NO, MT.USE_YN AS USE_YN, DT.MEMBER_NM AS MEMBER_NM, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(DT.TEL_NO) AS TEL_NO, PKG_COMMON.FN_DECRYPT(DT.MPHONE_NO) AS MPHONE_NO, DT.COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, DT.BRANCH_ID AS BRANCH_ID, DT.SANGSA_ID AS SANGSA_ID, DT.MEMBER_GB AS MEMBER_GB FROM TM_MEMBER_MT MT LEFT JOIN TM_MEMBER_DT DT ON MT.LOGIN_ID = DT.LOGIN_ID WHERE MT.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TM_MEMBER_MT SET PASS_WD = #{PASS_WD}, UPD_USER = #{UPD_USER}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE, ERROR_COUNT = '0' WHERE LOGIN_ID=#{LOGIN_ID}
UPDATE TM_MEMBER_MT SET LOGIN_GB = #{LOGIN_GB}, REGIST_NO = PKG_COMMON.FN_ENCRYPT(#{REGIST_NO}), UPD_USER = #{LOGIN_ID}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID}

UPDATE TM_MEMBER_DT SET TEL_NO = PKG_COMMON.FN_ENCRYPT(#{TEL_NO}), MPHONE_NO = PKG_COMMON.FN_ENCRYPT(#{MPHONE_NO}), UPD_USER = #{LOGIN_ID}, MEMBER_NM = #{MEMBER_NM}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TM_MEMBER_MT ( LOGIN_ID, PASS_WD, LOGIN_GB, REGIST_NO, INS_USER, INS_DATE ) VALUES ( #{LOGIN_ID}, #{PASS_WD}, #{LOGIN_GB}, PKG_COMMON.FN_ENCRYPT(#{REGIST_NO}), 'FIRST', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TM_MEMBER_DT ( LOGIN_ID, MEMBER_ID, ASSOCIATION_ID, COMPANY_ID, BRANCH_ID, SANGSA_ID, MEMBER_NM, MEMBER_GB, TEL_NO, MPHONE_NO, CONFIRM_DT, USE_YN, INS_USER, INS_DATE ) VALUES ( #{LOGIN_ID}, #{MEMBER_ID}, #{ASSOCIATION_ID}, #{COMPANY_ID}, #{BRANCH_ID}, #{SANGSA_ID}, #{MEMBER_NM}, #{MEMBER_GB}, PKG_COMMON.FN_ENCRYPT(#{TEL_NO}), PKG_COMMON.FN_ENCRYPT(#{MPHONE_NO}), NULL, 'W', 'FIRST', SYSDATE )
